title: TelegramLogger
description: Send player connection from proxy to your telegram channel/chat
body:
# Telegram Logger
This plugin allows you to receive notifications in a telegram group/chat when a player connects to the Velocity server

## Installation
- Download the latest version from the [versions page](https://modrinth.com/plugin/telegramlogger/versions).
- Move the installed file to the `plugins` folder.
- Start server.

## Usage
After fully setting up the plugin, you will receive notifications about players joining from your Velocity server
![work image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/875335983296577606/1162679318367961148/image_2.png?ex=653cd07f&is=652a5b7f&hm=b4589db3f5c30fc5611be88ae3fb8fecad2cacae61ed8b5bbd180c765a9cd8f6&)

## Configuration
- After starting server, `config.yml` will be generated in the `plugins/telegram-logger` folder
- In field `telegramBotToken` you must write your [Telegram Bot Token](t.me/BotFather)
- In field 'chatId' you must write your [Telegram Chat Id](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/32423837/telegram-bot-how-to-get-a-group-chat-id/32572159#32572159)
- You can configure messages in fields `playerLoginMessage` `proxyStartMessage` `proxyShutdownMessage`

## Find bug or need help?
- You can join my [discord](https://discord.gg/nyyyDStTRF) and ask for help =)
